hero.badge: ✦ Built on the Geist design system
hero.title: A token-driven component library.
hero.desc: Built on Web Components and the Geist design system. Every surface below is themed by the same --ran-* tokens — flip dark mode to watch them all re-resolve at once.
home.design.d: Geist color scales, radius, elevation, typography, and light/dark tokens.
home.components.d: ~24 Shadow-DOM components: buttons, forms, feedback, surfaces, charts.
home.guide.d: Install, theming API, i18n, and SSR — everything to ship.
design.title: Design system
design.desc: ranui's tokens follow the Geist design system (design.md / design.dark.md). Base scales → semantic tokens → component tokens; dark mode redefines only the base scale.
sec.typo.lead: Pick a role, not a size. Each role fixes the font, size, weight, and line-height up front.
sec.dark.lead: Semantic tokens reference the base scale, so a single dark mixin redefines the scale and everything re-resolves. Same token name, different value — gray-1000 is #171717 in light, #ededed in dark.
design.states.lead: Each step has one job, so hover / active / border / text states are decided up front — no guessing per component:
sec.spacing.lead: A 4px base unit with just nine values. 8px within a group, 16px between groups, 32–40px between sections — a limited set keeps the rhythm.
sec.motion.lead: Prefer none. When motion clarifies a change, keep it quick, light, and restrained.
motion.instant: Changes that are already obvious — apply instantly.
sec.content.lead: Copy is part of the system. Be specific and remove guesswork.
do.label: ✓ Do
dont.label: ✕ Don't
content.btn.do: Buttons: an action plus an object.
content.err.do: Errors: what happened, then how to fix it.
content.err.do.s: Build failed: the bundle exceeds the size limit. Reduce it or raise the limit.
sec.a11y.lead: The system serves everyone — keyboard users, low vision, bright sunlight.
a11y.notcolor: Never signal state with color alone — pair it with an icon or text.
a11y.focus: Every interactive element has a visible focus ring.
a11y.keyboard: Full keyboard navigation; nothing is mouse-only.
components.title: Components
components.desc: Every component is Shadow-DOM encapsulated and themed through CSS variables, ::part(), and the sheet attribute.
guide.title: Guide
guide.desc: Everything you need to install ranui, theme it, localize it, and render it on the server.
guide.install.lead: Install the package, then import the global styles once and the components you need.
guide.theme.lead: Switch theme or override any token at runtime. SSR-safe.
guide.i18n.lead: A framework-agnostic i18n core (the same one driving this page's language switch).
guide.ssr.lead: Render components to a Declarative Shadow DOM string and hydrate on the client.
sec.colors.lead: Ten-step scales where each step maps to a fixed interface state — color is just how a state looks.
input.username.label: Username
input.password.label: Password
input.email.label: Email
card.cross.title: Cross-framework
card.cross.desc: Drop ranui into React, Vue, or vanilla — they are native custom elements.
card.token.title: Token-based styling
card.token.desc: Theme with documented CSS variables, no build step required.
card.ssr.title: SSR ready
card.ssr.desc: Server-render to a string and hydrate on the client.
tab.overview.body: ranui ships ~24 components, all Shadow-DOM encapsulated.
tab.api.body: Each component exposes attributes, ::part(), and CSS variables.
tab.theming.body: Light/dark via a single attribute; tokens follow the Geist scale.
modal.title: Deploy to production
modal.body: This will push the current build to the production environment. Continue?
